auth.name: Name
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.

realMoney.title: Real Money Spend Calculator
realMoney.description: Here you can calculate how much real money and Tibia Coins you would spend to get certain quantity of Tibia Gold

calculator.priceFor250TcMsg: Price for 250 Tibia Coins must be at least 2 characters.
calculator.tibiaGoldForOneTcMsg: Tibia gold for one Tibia Coin must be at least 2 characters.
calculator.goldToConvertMsg: Gold to convert must be at least 2 characters.
calculator.priceFor250TcDesc: The price in real money, default is $200 pesos MXN.
calculator.tibiaGoldForOneTc: Tibia Gold for ONE Tibia Coin
calculator.tibiaGoldForOneTcDesc: The amount of Tibia Gold for ONE Tibia Coin, default is 40k gold.
calculator.goldToConvertDesc: Enter the amount of gold you want to convert, with format "10kk", for example.

imbuings.title: What imbuements can I set to my item?
imbuings.description: Select your item from list and learn which imbuements it can have.

imbuingChecker.conflictMsg: This item has {{elements}} — conflicting imbuements are blocked.

huntingSpots.title: Where can I hunt at certain level? What set should I use?
huntingSpots.description: Here you can find hunting spots as well as recommendations of set to use there and which imbuements to use.

exaltationForge.title: Exaltation Forge Simulator
exaltationForge.description: Estimate fusion gold, Exalted Core usage, and item cost up to a target tier. Forge gold per classification matches Tibia Wiki (regular fusion).

fusion.label: Fusion
fusion.description: Merge two identical items to increase one's tier. Uses probability — best / average / worst-case simulation over 10,000 runs.

convergenceFusion.label: Convergence Fusion
convergenceFusion.description: Guaranteed fusion for Classification 4 items. Fuse two different items of the same body slot at a higher gold cost. No RNG, no bonus effects.

transfer.label: Transfer
transfer.description: Transfer a tier from one item to another of the same classification. Source item is destroyed; target receives tier minus 1.

convergenceTransfer.label: Convergence Transfer
convergenceTransfer.description: Class 4 only. Transfer a tier with no tier loss — target receives the same tier as the source. Cross-slot transfers allowed.

exaltationForge.howToUseDesc: Use this tool to estimate the cost of forging an item up to a certain tier (regular fusion gold from the wiki, plus item and Exalted Core prices you provide).
exaltationForge.fusionHelp1c: Value (price) of the item used in the forge (gp)
exaltationForge.fusionHelp2: In the tier table, choose in which fusions you plan to use Exalted Cores (e.g. success rate / tier-loss mitigation).
exaltationForge.fusionHelp3: Click Calculate to run 10,000 random simulations and see best, average, and worst total cost (plus per-tier successes, failures, and saves).
exaltationForge.transferHelp1: Source item must be at least tier 2 and will be destroyed.
exaltationForge.transferHelp2: Target item must be at tier 0 and receives source tier minus 1.
exaltationForge.transferHelp3: Always succeeds. Requires 100 Dust + Exalted Cores + Gold.
exaltationForge.transferHelp4: Both items must be of the same classification and unimbued.
exaltationForge.convergenceFusionHelp2: Fuse two different items of the same body slot at the same tier (e.g. two tier-3 class-4 armors) — they don't have to be identical items.
exaltationForge.convergenceFusionHelp3: Guaranteed success — no RNG, no bonus effects, no tier loss.
exaltationForge.convergenceFusionHelp4: Costs 130 Dust per fusion (vs 100 for regular fusion).
exaltationForge.convergenceFusionHelp5: Item 2 is always consumed. Result is item 1 at current tier + 1.
exaltationForge.convergenceTransferHelp2: Transfers a tier with no tier loss — target receives the same tier as the source (unlike regular transfer which gives tier-1).
exaltationForge.convergenceTransferHelp3: Allows transferring between different body slots (e.g. Falcon Wand to Sanguine Legs).
exaltationForge.convergenceTransferHelp4: Source item is destroyed. Target must be at tier 0.
exaltationForge.importDialogDesc: Select a project to add this simulation as a new entry.
exaltationForge.noFusionSteps: No fusion steps for target tier 0.
exaltationForge.noFusionGold: Classification {{classification}} has no listed fusion gold for tier step(s): {{steps}}. Deterministic totals skip those steps.
exaltationForge.resultingTierNoLoss: Resulting tier on target: Tier {{tier}} (no tier loss!)
exaltationForge.forgeGoldNote: Forge gold values follow Tibia Wiki (Equipment Upgrade to Fusion). Class 4 amounts are editable if you want to model other costs. Totals use the column that matches your classification.
exaltationForge.simErrorMissingGold: Simulation could not run: missing forge gold for this classification at one or more tier steps.
exaltationForge.simulationNote: Each run simulates fusions until one item reaches your desired tier. Success chance is 50% (65% with "Use Exalted Core 1"). On failure, one item may lose a tier unless "Use Exalted Core 2" avoids it (50% chance). Extra items are bought at your item price when needed.

coinsToMoney.title: Tibia Coins to Real Money Calculator
coinsToMoney.description: Here you can calculate how much real money would cost certain amount of Tibia Coins.

calculator.priceForOneTcDesc: The price in real money, default is $0.84 pesos MXN.
calculator.tcQuantityDesc: The amount of Tibia Coins you want to convert, default is 250.
calculator.priceForOneTcMsg: Price for One Tibia Coin must be at least 1 character.
calculator.tcQuantityMsg: Tibia Coins Quantity must be at least 1 character.

pagesCard.title: Utilities
pagesCard.description: Useful or not so useful tools, just for practice.
pagesCard.descriptionRealMoney: Calculate how much real money will cost your Tibia gold.
pagesCard.titleTibiaCoins: Tibia Coins to Real Money Calculator

pagesCard.descriptionImbuing: What imbuings can you put on your items?
pagesCard.descriptionHuntSpots: Find the best hunting spots for your level and which set to use.
pagesCard.descriptionExaltation: Learn how exaltation works and how to use it.
pagesCard.descriptionMyTierProjects: Track your usages and costs of your project to your desired tier.
pagesCard.descriptionPublicProjects: Browse tier projects shared by the community.

myTierProjects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
myTierProjects.deleteProjectConfirm: This will permanently delete this project and all its entries.
myTierProjects.deleteEntryConfirm: This will remove this entry and recalculate the total spent.
myTierProjects.noEntries: No entries yet. Add your first spending record.
myTierProjects.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
myTierProjects.noCostData: No cost data for this combination
myTierProjects.duplicateProjectDesc: Create a copy of this project with all its entries as a template.
